Description (Premium Data):
Welcome to 302 Laurel Street! 

Wonderfully large, recently renovated, 3,500+ square foot (per tax records), 5 plus bedroom, 3.5 bath, 4-level handsome home. This circa 1900 Victorian home offers elegant public spaces for grand entertaining plus many private areas for family intimate gatherings. Plus, a flat backyard and a deck and 1 car garage for easy parking, equipped with an EV charger. .

2 blocks from Laurel Village and quick walk to Julius Kahn Playground, the JCC, and all the delightful restaurants and shops on Sacramento Street!

GROUND LEVEL:
- 1-car garage with internal access to the home
- Large media room sink, bar, wine refrigerator; plus lovely French doors leading out to flat yard 
- Guest bedroom or home office; perfect privacy for guests or an au pair
- Bathroom with shower
- Tons of storage 

MAIN LEVEL:
- Beautiful formal living room with 3 walls of bay windows and a wood burning fireplace 
- Large formal dining room that comfortably seats 10-12; 
- Spacious chef's kitchen with top-of-the-line appliances, including Subzero refrigerator, 6 burner Wolf gas stove, dishwasher. PLUS room for an informal dining room.
- Formal dining room and kitchen with access to the rear yard.
- Guest powder room. 

3rd LEVEL:
- 2 bedrooms and 2 baths, including beautiful main suite. Main bedroom has spa like en suite bathroom with shower and deep soaking tub, plus a HUGE walk-in closet (has been used as an additional bedroom). 
- 2nd bedroom comes equipped with a wet bar and a functional wood burning fireplace and views of the Golden Gate. 
- Laundry area. 

TOP LEVEL:
Huge office with GG views
- Children's study / game area/ family room 
- Two additional bedrooms
- Full size bathroom 

ADDITIONAL FEATURES INCLUDE:
- Backyard, accessible from ground level and main level, includes recently built deck, great for an outdoor entertainment and grilling, professionally landscaped. 
- Ample storage throughout the house
- Great natural light throughout the entire house. 
- Hardwood floors in most rooms, with partial carpeting and tile. 
- Custom window coverings. 
- Wi-Fi security cameras. 

TERMS:
- Available for mid to late June occupancy 
- Monthly Rent: $28,000
- Minimum 12 month lease 
- Security Deposit: 1.5x one month rent
- Tenant pays all utilities including landscape maintenance 
- Cat or a small dog considered with a deposit of 2 month rent 
- No smoking

Magnificent Mission Dolores Condo with Beautiful Backyard and Storage

Available for rent starting May 21st. 12-month lease minimum (multi-year lease preferred). Unfurnished.
 
*Neighborhood: Mission Dolores / Inner Mission
*Bedrooms: 3-4 spacious bedrooms (living room could live like a fourth bedroom)
*Bathrooms: 1 BA (split)
*In-unit washer-dryer
*Yard: LARGE backyard
*Style: Condo
*Lease Term: 1 Year+
*Square Feet: 1,400+ sqft per tax records
*Large living/dining room
*Updated chef's kitchen (gas-stove) with custom cabinetry and new Bosch stainless appliances (not featured in photos)
*Refinished, full-wood oak floor
*Forced-air heating
*Unfurnished
*Pets Permitted (Non aggressive breeds)
*Tenant responsibly for all utilities 
 
The home is situated in the perfect location in the city with a 100 Transit Score, 99 Walk Score and 99 Bike Score!
 
In the epicenter of vibrant Mission-Dolores, this stylish 3-4 bedroom + large living room (could be used as a fourth bedroom), split bathroom condo in Mission Dolores is the epitome of San Francisco living. The home is bathed in natural sunlight and has been given a modern update while maintaining its historic appeal. Combining the beauty of this classic building with access to some of the most vibrant neighborhoods in SF, this condo has it all.
 
Built for entertaining, this is the home to host dinner parties, have friends over for drinks, have ample space to work from home, or just stretch out for a night in. The living room is sunny and bright overlooking the large shared backyard. The kitchen is spacious and updated and opens onto an attached dining area (enjoy the fully equipped gas kitchen with new stainless Bosch appliances which are not currently featured in the photos). This condo boasts three very spacious bedrooms plus the large living room (could be used as a spacious fourth bedroom), each with period architectural detailing, high ceilings, big windows, and refinished wood floors. Two of the bedrooms have bay windows that can be used for an office or sitting area.
 
The property features all the best details of great San Francisco homes with soaring ceilings and architectural details such as wainscoting, original trim, pocket doors, and ceiling medallions. There are freshly refinished wood floors and modern designer lighting. The home is completed with new in-unit laundry and a massive storage unit that can be accessed from the street level, great for storing bikes and gear. Leased parking is available off-site.
 
The building is set on an oversized lot and the home overlooks a serene and park-like shared backyard with a sitting and dining area. It features a gorgeous freshly painted facade, new wood windows on the front of the building, a new back staircase, and many recent electrical and plumbing upgrades.
 
Neighborhood:
Located in an A+ location in one of San Francisco's sunny micro climates, the condo is steps from Dolores Park/Valencia corridor/Inner Mission. The neighborhood features Mission-Dolores park (a few minutes walk from the property) and vibrant and exciting world-class restaurants, coffee shops, and boutiques. Walk down tree lined streets, enjoy some afternoon tennis and savor a new flavor of ice cream at Bi Rite Creamery. Close to MUNI, BART, tech shuttles and freeway access.

*Rent: $9,995
*Deposit: $7,500
*Lease Term: 12-month minimum (multi-year lease preferred)
*Parking: Leased parking available nearbyShow more

Avalon Hayes Valley offers studio, 1, and 2 bedroom apartments and townhomes.

Avalon Hayes Valley offers studio, 1, and 2 bedroom apartments and townhomes. Convenient to the BART, MUNI, and the 101/I-80 freeway ramp, these San Francisco apartments feature gourmet kitchens with stainless steel appliances and granite countertops, spacious walk-in closets, and in-unit washer and dryer. Upgrade any home to Furnished+ and enjoy the convenience of turnkey living. Community amenities include a fitness center and beautifully landscaped rooftop terraces with outdoor seating and BBQs. Avalon Hayes Valley is located in the heart of the San Francisco; convenient to downtown, Civic Center, the Mission, SOMA and the Castro.
